items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is included among the 10 Dividend Stocks With Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential. On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham sai

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: 'In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced,' said Jérôme Pécresse, head of Rio Tinto's aluminum and lithium business unit. Albemarle noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily gr

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB) from 'High Risk' to 'Buy'. Target price remains at $225. Citi assessed that the possibility of the lithium market shifting to a significant oversupply phase is low, considering the increase in demand for EVs and ESS.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC reiterated Outperform and
